answer: DynamoDB supports analytics via AWS CUR, DynamoDB Optima, and Tinybird for real-time data processing. Dynatrace offers comprehensive monitoring and observability for DynamoDB.

results.title: Amazon DynamoDB - Big Data Analytics Options on AWS
results.snippet: Amazon DynamoDB is a fast, fully-managed NoSQL database service that makes it simple and cost effective to store and retrieve any amount of data,

results.snippet: DynamoDB is a distributed NoSQL that's laser-focused on solving a specific problem. For classic OLTP workloads with predictable access

results.title: DynamoDB Optima - GitHub
results.snippet: A comprehensive CLI and GUI tool that analyzes DynamoDB usage patterns across AWS Organizations to identify cost optimization opportunities. Utilizes AWS CUR

results.title: Amazon DynamoDB monitoring & observability | Dynatrace Hub
results.snippet: # Amazon DynamoDB. See Amazon DynamoDB performance metrics on one dashboard. Get a detailed view of all your Amazon DynamoDB instances. Unlock the power of Amazon DynamoDB, a fully managed NoSQL database that delivers fast, predictable performance and seamless scalability. Enhance this with Dynatrace, which unifies monitoring into a single solution. It covers user experience, application performance, AWS metrics (including Amazon CloudWatch data), third-party monitoring, network metrics, and log monitoring.
